#define SESSION_STRING_BUFFER_SIZE 40
#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Functions

#define ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS (2500LL * 5000LL * 5000LL)

Function Documentation

int main (int argc, char * argv[])

Definition at line 14 of file strings/main.c.

14                                  {
15   long long count = 1;
16   int dump_adjectives = 0;
17   int dump_nouns = 0;
18 
19   static struct option long_options[] = {
20     {"count", required_argument, 0, 'n'},
21     {"dump-adjectives", no_argument, 0, 'a'},
22     {"dump-nouns", no_argument, 0, 'o'},
23     {"help", no_argument, 0, 'h'},
24     {0, 0, 0, 0}
25   };
26 
27   int opt;
28   while ((opt = getopt_long(argc, argv, "n:aoh", long_options, NULL)) != -1) {
29     switch (opt) {
30       case 'n':
31         count = strtoll(optarg, NULL, 10);
32         break;
33       case 'a':
34         dump_adjectives = 1;
35         break;
36       case 'o':
37         dump_nouns = 1;
38         break;
39       case 'h':
40         printf("Usage: ascii-chat-strings [OPTIONS]\n");
41         printf("Generate memorable session strings (adjective-noun-noun format)\n");
42         printf("\nOptions:\n");
43         printf("  -n, --count COUNT        Generate COUNT session strings (default: 1)\n");
44         printf("  -a, --dump-adjectives    Dump adjectives list as JavaScript\n");
45         printf("  -o, --dump-nouns         Dump nouns list as JavaScript\n");
46         printf("  -h, --help               Show this help message\n");
47         return 0;
48       default:
49         return ERROR_USAGE;
50     }
51   }
52 
53   // Handle dump modes
54   if (dump_adjectives) {
55     printf("export const adjectives = [\n");
56     for (size_t i = 0; i < adjectives_count; i++) {
57       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", adjectives[i], (i < adjectives_count - 1) ? "," : "");
58     }
59     printf("];\n");
60     printf("export const adjectives_count = %zu;\n", adjectives_count);
61     return 0;
62   }
63 
64   if (dump_nouns) {
65     printf("export const nouns = [\n");
66     for (size_t i = 0; i < nouns_count; i++) {
67       printf("  \"%s\"%s\n", nouns[i], (i < nouns_count - 1) ? "," : "");
68     }
69     printf("];\n");
70     printf("export const nouns_count = %zu;\n", nouns_count);
71     return 0;
72   }
73 
74   // Normal session string generation
75   if (count <= 0 || (long long)count > ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS) {
76     return ERROR_USAGE;
77   }
78 
79   // Generate session strings
80   for (long long i = 0; i < count; i++) {
81     uint32_t adj_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)adjectives_count);
82     uint32_t noun1_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
83     uint32_t noun2_idx = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)nouns_count);
84 
85     printf("%s-%s-%s\n",
86            adjectives[adj_idx],
87            nouns[noun1_idx],
88            nouns[noun2_idx]);
89   }
90 
91   return 0;
92 }




References ACDS_MAX_UNIQUE_SESSIONS, adjectives,
    adjectives_count, nouns, and nouns_count.
